name: OpenProject REST API
what_it_does: Open-source project management platform with REST API for managing work packages (issues/tasks), projects, timelines, Gantt charts, wikis, and team collaboration — offering self-hosted and cloud options with full API access.
use_cases: Creating and updating work packages (tasks, bugs, stories) programmatically via API
Querying project status, progress, and team workloads for reporting agents
Integrating OpenProject issue tracking with CI/CD and deployment pipelines
Managing project hierarchies and work breakdown structures via API
Automating project planning workflows with time tracking and budget management
not_for: Organizations needing SaaS-only project management without self-hosting option
Simple personal task management (too heavyweight — use Todoist or Linear)
Real-time collaboration features beyond async project management
best_when: A project management agent needs open-source project tracking with full API access, Gantt charts, and self-hosted deployment for data control.
avoid_when: You need modern developer-centric issue tracking — Linear or GitHub Issues are better for software teams.

auth.notes: API key (token) for programmatic access. HTTP Basic auth supported. OAuth2 for third-party integrations. Token generated in user account settings. Self-hosted instances use same auth model.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Community edition: completely free self-hosted with all core features
pricing.notes: GPL v3 open source — free to self-host with all features. Cloud hosting subscription. Enterprise adds support SLA and advanced features. Very competitive open-source alternative to Jira.

performance.rate_limits: Self-hosted: limited by server; Cloud: rate limits per plan

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API v3 well-documented on openproject.org. HAL+JSON hypermedia format used — different from plain JSON REST. Error responses include error codes and messages. Webhook delivery for work package changes.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Read operations are idempotent. Work package creation creates new items — no built-in idempotency key. Update operations are idempotent with same data.
known_agent_gotchas: HAL+JSON hypermedia format differs from standard REST JSON — agents need to follow links
Self-hosted and cloud instances may have version differences
Work package schema differs by project type — validate schema before bulk operations
Large Gantt/timeline queries can be slow for complex project hierarchies

security_score_components.security_notes: GPL v3 open source — full audit possible. OAuth2 and API key auth. TLS enforced on cloud. Self-hosted allows full security control. GDPR compliant (German company). EU-based data residency.
